---
title: "PAM CBLS"
author: "Pooja Pednekar"
date: "2026-04-02"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = TRUE,
  message = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE,
  fig.width = 8,
  fig.height = 4,
  fig.align = 'center',
  dpi = 300
)
```

#Loading packages and data
```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(janitor)
library(ggpubr)
library(lme4)
library(lmerTest)
library(emmeans)


custom_colors <- c("BT1/2" = "lightblue4", "BT3/4" = "#D55E00")

PAM <- read.csv("C:/PUTNAM LAB/CBLS_Wetlab/Data/PAM_CBLS_Aquarium.csv") %>% clean_names()

PAM <- PAM %>% mutate(date = as.factor(date),
                   timepoint = factor(timepoint), 
                tank_id= as.factor(tank_id))

ggplot(PAM,aes(x = date, y = fv_fm_y_1000)) + 
    geom_boxplot(aes(fill = tank_id)) + labs(x = "Date", y = "Fv/Fm", title = "Fv/Fm by Date and Tank") +
  theme_minimal()

ggsave("../output/FvFm_recovery_acclimation.png", plot = last_plot(), width = 9, height = 4, bg = "white")
```
